skills.name: Wugong Gu
skills.description: Fire a contagious poison arrow. The poisoned target spreads poison around to nearby enemies every time it is attacked.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
[Poison] Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds

skills.name: Poison Pot
skills.description: Create a poison puddle by throwing a pot filled with poison. Any enemy who comes into contact with the puddle is poisoned. Targets continue to receive damage for a moment after stepping away from the puddle.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per 1 second: SkillFactor %
Target: CaptionRatio2
Tile Duration: 15 seconds

skills.name: Golden Frog
skills.description: Tutu appears and damages the enemy periodically. Damages 5 times additionally in order when receives [Golden Frog: Poison] debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Golden Frog Duration: 10 seconds
[Golden Frog: Poison] Duration: 60 seconds
Targets: 10(4 during PvP)

skills.name: Zhendu
skills.description: Apply bird poison to your weapon.
skills.effect_text:
[Zhendu]
- Duration: 30 minutes
- Increases Final Damage of Wugushi skills by CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Latent Venom
skills.description: Fires a poisonous arrow that deals continuous damage for a long period of time
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Duration: 100 seconds

skills.name: Wide Miasma
skills.description: Throw a vial of poison to the ground and break it. Enemies who inhaled the toxic cloud is poisoned, and the caster hides into the toxic cloud. Increases Movement Speed during stealth mode.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per second
[Poison]Duration: 15 seconds
[Stealth] Duration: 10 seconds
Increase Movement Speed by 3

skills.name: Crescendo Bane
skills.description: Damage cycle of Wugushi skill decreases during Crescendo Bane buff.
skills.effect_text:
Buff Duration: 15 seconds
[Poison Tile, Debuff] damage cycle - CaptionRatio %

attributes.name: Wugong Gu: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Wugong Gu] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Poison Pot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Poison Pot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Wugushi: Poison Reserve
attributes.description: * Decreases Poison Pot cost by 1% per attribute level when using a Wugushi skill

attributes.name: Zhendu: Decreased Poison Resistance
attributes.description:
* Reduces the Poison property resistance of enemies within a range of 150 by 10% per attribute level when [Zhendu] is used

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Wugushi: Two-handed Poison
attributes.description: * Wugushi skills receive the attack of the weapon in the subweapon slot, instead of the main weapon
